title: reseda aucheri subsp. rotundifolia
intro: Reseda aucheri subsp. rotundifolia, also known as the Round-leaved Reseda, is a plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Reseda aucheri subsp. rotundifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from symptoms associated with respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
